name: Morningstar Investment Data API
what_it_does: Morningstar REST APIs for investment research and data platform. Enables AI agents to manage mutual fund, ETF, and equity performance data retrieval for investment analytics, handle Morningstar star rating and analyst rating data for fund selection, access investment portfolio risk and performance attribution analysis, retrieve ESG rating and sustainability score data for responsible investment research, manage global equity fundamental data and financial statement retrieval, handle fixed income data including bond analytics and credit quality assessment, access retirement plan and 401(k) investment option data for plan analytics, retrieve market indices and benchmark performance data, manage category classification and peer comparison data for fund analytics, and integrate investment research data with portfolio management, wealth management, and financial planning systems.
use_cases: Retrieving fund ratings from investment selection agents
Analyzing portfolio risk from wealth management agents
Accessing ESG scores from responsible investment agents
Benchmarking performance from portfolio analytics agents
not_for: High-frequency trading without investment research and fundamentals focus
Real-time order management without investment analytics context
Consumer investment tools without appropriate licensing and compliance
best_when: An asset manager, wealth manager, or financial planning firm using Morningstar data wants AI agents to automate fund analysis, portfolio attribution, ESG scoring, peer comparison, and investment research workflows.
avoid_when: LICENSING RISK: Morningstar ratings and data are licensed content — redistribution without appropriate licensing violates data agreements. Morningstar star ratings in marketing materials and investment recommendations require compliance review. ESG scores are methodology-dependent; different Morningstar ESG methodologies produce different results; understand methodology before comparative use.

auth.notes: Morningstar uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. Per-organization credentials with data entitlements. Developer portal at developer.morningstar.com. No webhooks. REST API with JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Public (MORN NASDAQ). Morningstar Direct (institutional) vs. Morningstar Data (API) product distinction.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual data licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual data license per data set, use case, and distribution rights
pricing.notes: Chicago, Illinois. Founded 1984. Public (MORN NASDAQ). $2.2B+ annual revenue. Investment research and data market. 250,000+ investment products covered. Morningstar star rating industry standard for fund evaluation. Strong in wealth management, retirement, and asset management. Competes with Lipper (Refinitiv) for fund data market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; data entitlement-based access

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSING RISK: Morningstar star ratings in investment communications require licensing and compliance review; unauthorized rating use in marketing creates regulatory and IP issues
Data entitlement model — API access is gated by data entitlements in your subscription; missing entitlements return empty responses not errors; validate entitlement coverage for your data needs
ESG methodology distinction — Morningstar Global ESG Scores, Morningstar Portfolio ESG Score, and Sustainalytics ESG Risk Rating are different methodologies; specify which methodology you're using
Fund vs. share class — Morningstar data is organized at fund and share class level; understand aggregation vs. share class level for accurate analytics
Survivorship bias — fund universe snapshots include only currently active funds; historical analysis requires point-in-time database with terminated funds
No webhooks — rating and data updates require polling; batch data delivery preferred for large universe updates vs. per-security polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Investment research and data. SOC2, GDPR, MiFID2. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Fund performance and ESG data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Investment data and research. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Fund, ESG, and investment data.
